description_long: An adult woman is depicted lying flat on her back with her arms relaxed at her sides and legs extended straight. She is dressed in a collared shirt with long sleeves and a knee-length skirt, presenting a neat and professional appearance. Her feet are bare, and her posture is completely supine, with her head resting on the ground and her face turned slightly to one side. The figure's hair is styled in a tidy, medium-length ponytail. The clothing fits closely to the body, and there are no visible accessories or carried items. The overall form is realistic, with natural body proportions and subtle anatomical details.
description: A supine adult woman in professional attire, lying flat with arms at her sides and bare feet, hair in a ponytail. The figure is detailed and lifelike, with a relaxed posture and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the back of the head, shoulders, and the full length of the body, with arms and legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight alignment of the body, and the relaxed position of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: View from the feet, emphasizing the soles, the underside of the legs, and the front of the torso and face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the face, the body’s side, and the relaxed arm and leg positions.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve collared shirt and knee-length skirt
